/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/vector4__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/hardwarestatus__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/point__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/pose__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/quaternion__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/srv/detail/multiply_two_ints__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_interfaces/srv/detail/dotproduct__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
